hotels.name: Kailash International Youth Hostel (Six-Star Street Branch)
hotels.description_fr:
Situé à Yining, l’établissement Kailash International Youth Hostel (Six-Star Street Branch) possède un jardin, un salon commun, une terrasse et une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite dans l’ensemble de ses locaux. Vous pourrez profiter d'un service d'étage et d'une réception ouverte 24h/24.
Tous les hébergements sont pourvus d’une machine à café. Vous profiterez d’une salle de bains commune, d'articles de toilette gratuits et de linge de lit.
L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport de Yining) est à 3 km.
Les distances indiquées dans la description de l'établissement sont calculées avec © OpenStreetMap.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Kailash International Youth Hostel in Yining offers comfortable rooms with air-conditioning, kitchenettes, and free WiFi. Each room includes a tea and coffee maker, refrigerator, and free toiletries.
Leisure Facilities: Guests can relax in the garden or on the terrace. The hotel features a lounge, games room, and yoga classes. Film nights and walking tours provide entertainment options.
Convenient Services: Private check-in and check-out, a 24-hour front desk, concierge service, and room service ensure a pleasant stay. Additional amenities include a minibar, microwave, and kitchenware.
Location and Access: Located 3 km from Yining Airport, the hostel is situated on Six-Star Street. English and Chinese are spoken at reception.
hotels.description_es:
Kailash International Youth Hostel (Six-Star Street Branch) está en Yining y tiene jardín, salón de uso común, terraza y wifi gratis en todo el alojamiento. El alojamiento dispone de servicio de habitaciones y recepción 24 horas.
Las habitaciones de este alojamiento están equipadas con cafetera. Las unidades tienen baño compartido, artículos de aseo gratuitos y ropa de cama.
El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Yining) está a 3 km.
Las distancias en la descripción del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMap©
hotels.description_pt:
Kailash International Youth Hostel (Six-Star Street Branch) encontra-se em Yining e tem um jardim, salão partilhado, terraço e acesso Wi-Fi gratuito em toda a propriedade. O alojamento apresenta serviço de quartos e uma receção aberta 24 horas.
As unidades do alojamento estão equipados com máquina de café. Todos os quartos têm uma casa de banho partilhada, produtos de higiene pessoal gratuitos e roupa de cama.
O Aeroporto de Yining fica a 3 km da propriedade.
A distância mencionada na descrição do alojamento é calculada com o © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_it:
Ubicato a Yining, Kailash International Youth Hostel (Six-Star Street Branch) offre un giardino, una sala comune, una terrazza e il WiFi gratuito in tutta la struttura. La struttura propone servizio in camera e reception aperta 24 ore su 24 per gli ospiti.
Le unità presso questo hotel prevedono una macchina da caffè. Tutte le camere hanno il bagno in comune, i prodotti da bagno gratuiti e le lenzuola.
Aeroporto di Yining si trova a 3 km dalla struttura.
Le distanze nella descrizione della struttura sono calcolate con © OpenStreetMap

hotels.name: Four Points by Sheraton Yining
hotels.description_fr:
L'établissement Four Points by Sheraton Yining vous accueille à Yining. Vous pourrez admirer la vue sur la ville.

L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport de Yining) est à 5 km.

Les distances indiquées dans la description de l'établissement sont calculées avec © OpenStreetMap.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Four Points by Sheraton Yining in Yining offers comfortable rooms with city views. Each room includes air-conditioning, a work desk, and free WiFi, ensuring a pleasant stay.
Convenient Facilities: Guests can enjoy a fitness centre, swimming pool, and a hot tub. Additional amenities include a sauna, steam room, and massage services, catering to relaxation needs.
Prime Location: Situated 5 km from Yining Airport, the hotel provides easy access to local attractions. Nearby points of interest include the Yining Development Zone and the Yining Museum.
Distance in property description is calculated using © OpenStreetMap
